name: A new pilot?!
description:
You're a new pilot of Unit-03 and somehow, Miss Katsuragi found some place for you in her apartment, with Asuka and Shinji. However, you can choose to live with Rei instead.

Be nice.

UPD: Had to change the avatar due to the site policy

If bot keeps answering for you - use JLLM advanced prompt or just erase the unnecessary part.

All characters portrayed by this bot are at least 18 years of age.
creator: Rdeanrer
